# Higress

> Root llms.txt entrypoint for Higress LLM-friendly documentation indexes.

## Docs

- [Higress Plugin Index](./llmstxt/llms.txt): Aggregated index for all built-in Wasm plugin llms files.
- [Repository README](./README.md): Project overview and quick start.

## Optional

- [Higress Plugin Hub](https://higress.cn/plugin/): Official plugin catalog.
